name: Event Bus Singleton
description: Global event bus autoload for decoupled scene communication
template:
extends Node
## Global Event Bus — Register as Autoload
## Enables decoupled communication between distant nodes in the scene tree.
## Usage: EventBus.player_died.emit(player)

# --- Game Flow ---
signal game_started
signal game_paused
signal game_resumed
signal game_over(is_victory: bool)
signal level_completed(level_id: int)
signal level_loaded(level_name: String)

# --- Player ---
signal player_spawned(player: Node)
signal player_died(player: Node)
signal player_health_changed(current_health: int, max_health: int)
signal player_mana_changed(current_mana: int, max_mana: int)
signal player_level_up(new_level: int)

# --- Combat ---
signal damage_dealt(target: Node, amount: int, source: Node)
signal enemy_died(enemy: Node, position: Vector2)
signal boss_defeated(boss_id: String)

# --- Items & Inventory ---
signal item_collected(item_data: Resource)
signal item_used(item_data: Resource)
signal inventory_changed
signal currency_changed(new_amount: int)

# --- UI ---
signal show_dialogue(speaker: String, text: String)
signal hide_dialogue
signal notification_requested(message: String, duration: float)
signal screen_shake_requested(intensity: float, duration: float)

# --- Audio ---
signal play_sfx(sfx_name: String)
signal play_music(track_name: String, fade_duration: float)
signal stop_music(fade_duration: float)

# --- Save/Load ---
signal save_requested
signal load_requested
signal save_completed(success: bool)
